title: Revert --worktree flag in agent invocation
description:
Revert the native --worktree flag adoption from commit a86e376. Drop WorktreeName and RepoRoot from RunOpts. Remove supportsNativeWorktree() detection. Agent invocation should only use cmd.Dir = opts.WorkDir.

Keep from a86e376:
- Path convention: .claude/worktrees/tk-<epic-id>/
- Branch convention: worktree-tk-<epic-id>
- Name(), Branch(), Path() helpers
- WorktreeNamePrefix (tk-) namespace isolation
- isWorktreeContainerDir() for dirty-check filtering
- Legacy .worktrees/ path in dirty-check filter

Files to modify:
- internal/agent/agent.go: remove WorktreeName, RepoRoot from RunOpts
- internal/agent/claude.go: remove supportsNativeWorktree(), simplify Run() to only use WorkDir
- internal/agent/agent_test.go: remove native worktree test
- internal/engine/engine.go: remove WorktreeName/RepoRoot usage, only set WorkDir
acceptance_criteria: Agent invocation uses cmd.Dir = opts.WorkDir only. No --worktree flag passed to Claude CLI. WorktreeName and RepoRoot removed from RunOpts. All existing tests pass.
closed_reason: Reverted native --worktree flag. Agent uses cmd.Dir = opts.WorkDir only.
